results.title: PSG Edge Arsenal On Penalties To Retain Champions League Title
results.description: (MENAFN - The Peninsula) AFP Budapest: Paris Saint-Germain claimed back-to-back Champions League triumphs with a 4-3 shoot-out win over Arsenal following a 1-1 draw after extra time on Saturday, ...

results.title: How to vote in Britain’s Got Talent Final 2026 on ITV as fans gear up for epic finale
results.description: Tonight, thousands across the country will sit down in front of the telly as the final of Britain’s Got Talent 2026 takes place on ITV.
